name: Giblet
description:
Giblet finds you injured in the town and brings you to his hideout to take care of you.

It doesn't matter if you're a human or a toy, Giblet just decided that you're the one to help! I also did not indicate whether you knew each other before. Enjoy!

There is information about Chum and outimals, I tried my best ;)

Wow, why does he have so few fans? I just love Giblet! I demand more Giblet! Seriously, you've seen how many artworks and bots have been dedicated to the Prototype and Lily, but everyone has forgotten about this charmer!

English is not my native language, I use a translator and wiki.

If you found errors in the gramatics, then it's just that my fingers do not hit the buttons, report in the comments and I will fix it. If the error is logical or in the construction of sentences, write the correct option in the comments. I would love the feedback!
creator: Cherry_lipstick_
